query: dashboard create client form scope presets and dropdowns

results.title: Phase 4.2 client dashboard UI planned
results.content: Updated README.md, docs/guides/admin-client-onboarding.md, docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md, and docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md to correct the current UX claim: client creation does not yet exist in the browser dashboard and still goes through the admin API. Added explicit Phase 4.2 planning for client-management dashboard UI with tasks for client registry, create-client form, client detail/key management, onboarding snippet UX, dashboard connection test/activity surface, and a browser-only verification gate. Commit: f108b16.

results.title: packageTourAdmin extracted add subscription modal component
results.content: Refactored PlanListScreen by moving the add-subscription modal and form into src/features/Plan/components/AddSubscriptionModal.tsx. The new component owns form state, company/user async selects, modal reset behavior, and validated value collection, while PlanListScreen keeps only modal visibility, selected plan state, and the subscription submit side effect. Verified with yarn tsc --noEmit and eslint on the touched files.

results.title: OmniSidebarFilterPanel: RHF state management + assignee pills from useAssigneeOptions
results.content: Refactored OmniSidebarFilterPanel to use React Hook Form (useForm + useController) instead of scattered useState. FilterFormValues = { sort, unread, state, assignedTo }. Single watch() subscription syncs all values to setSearchArgs in one useEffect. State pills bound to stateField, unread toggle to unreadField, sort select to sortField, assign pills to assignedToField. Replaced static ASSIGN_FILTERS ['mine','team'] with dynamic useAssigneeOptions.data — renders staff avatar + label pills, single-select toggle writes userId to assignedTo. Also replaced InboxFilterParams.assignedToMe with assignedTo?: string. Key files: OmniSidebarFilterPanel.tsx, InboxModel.ts.

results.title: OmniSidebarFilterPanel — State & AssignTo API integration
results.content: Integrated useInboxStateOptions and useAssigneeOptions hooks into OmniSidebarFilterPanel (src/components/organisms/OmniSidebar/OmniSidebarFilterPanel.tsx). Pattern mirrors ConversationHeader. Added: FilterFormValues type with state+assignedTo fields; useConversationCtx to read selectedInbox; both hooks called at component level; useEffect to reset form on selectedInbox change; UI section (State RHFReactSelect with InboxState formatter + AssignTo RHFReactSelect with ConversationAvatar) rendered inside Form only when selectedInbox?.id exists. Removed stale bare RHFSelect placeholder.

results.title: Phase 4.2 Wave 1 dashboard client creation implemented
results.content: Implemented P4.2-Wave1 by expanding /dashboard into a real client registry and adding a browser-native create-client flow. Added a Create Client form on the dashboard, POST /dashboard/clients in src/minder/server.py, one-time client API key reveal page after creation, and targeted browser-session tests in tests/integration/test_phase4_http_admin.py. Updated README.md, docs/guides/admin-client-onboarding.md, and docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md to reflect that browser-native client creation now exists while key rotate/revoke, onboarding snippets, and activity views remain for later waves. Verified with pytest, mypy, and ruff. Commit: 25713c9.
